macro.intro: The macro environment is characterized by rising inflation with CPI at 330.29% YoY, and geopolitical tensions impacting energy markets. The 10Y TIPS Real Yield has slightly decreased to 1.92%, indicating potential investor caution. No major economic events are scheduled today, allowing markets to focus on geopolitical developments.

snapshot.name: WTI Crude Oil
snapshot.note: Supply concerns due to Iran conflict

setups.name: WTI Crude Oil Long Setup
setups.rationale: With the ongoing Iran conflict, WTI Crude Oil is seeing upward pressure, currently at $102.30. The EU's warning of prolonged energy shocks supports further gains. Entry at $101.50, targeting $105.00, with a stop at $99.00.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No major events, focus on geopolitical

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: De-escalation in Iran could drop prices below $99.00

setups.hedge: Consider shorting Brent Crude if WTI breaks below $99.00.

setups.name: S&P 500 Short Setup
setups.rationale: Despite a rise to 4205.50, inflationary pressures with CPI at 330.29% could weigh on equities. Entry at 4200.00, targeting 4100.00, with a stop at 4250.00.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No major events, focus on inflation

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: Unexpected positive earnings could push index above 4250.00

setups.hedge: Consider long positions in defensive sectors if index breaks above 4250.00.

setups.name: EUR/USD Long Setup
setups.rationale: The EUR/USD is benefiting from a weaker dollar post-Iran war premium, currently at 1.0950. Entry at 1.0930, targeting 1.1000, with a stop at 1.0900.

metrics.label: Economic event
metrics.text: No major events, focus on dollar sentiment

concerns.label: Primary risk
concerns.text: US economic data surprise could strengthen dollar below 1.0900

concerns.label: Secondary risk
concerns.text: ECB policy changes impacting euro strength

setups.hedge: Consider shorting GBP/USD if EUR/USD breaks below 1.0900.

contrarian.body: Gold is currently at 1980.50, driven by safe-haven demand. However, if geopolitical tensions ease, a pullback to 1950.00 is possible. Entry at 1985.00, with a stop at 2000.00.
contrarian.warning: A sudden escalation in Iran could push gold above 2000.00. Monitor geopolitical developments closely.

avoid.reason: Tech stocks trimming profits, potential volatility today.
WTI more directly impacted by Iran conflict.
Earnings report pending, high volatility expected.
Risk from Iran war impacting summer flights.
Rising fertilizer costs impacting farmer sentiment.
